_global.text:
## Summary Build a FastAPI + React + PostgreSQL single-container app that serves a public task list (seeded with 3 tasks), a create-task form with validation, and an about page, plus a minimal seeded admin login, deployed on port 80 under the existing ingress prefix. ## Scope ### Files to modify - `Dockerfile` — replace nginx placeholder with multi-stage build (Node builds React → Python serves FastAPI + static on :80). - `index.html` (root) — delete; replaced by `frontend/` app. - `nginx.conf` — delete; no longer used (FastAPI serves static + SPA fallback). - `README.md` — document run/build, env vars, architecture. - `k8s/deployment.yaml` — add readiness/liveness probes hitting `/api/health` and `/api/health/deep`; keep container port 80. (No structural change to service/ingress.) ### Files to create **Backend (`backend/`)** - `requirements.txt` — fastapi, uvicorn[standard], sqlalchemy, psycopg[binary], pydantic, pydantic-settings, passlib[bcrypt], pyjwt. - `app/main.py` — FastAPI app; prefix-tolerant middleware; mount API routers; mount StaticFiles + SPA catch-all; startup DB init/seed (non-fatal). - `app/config.py` — settings from env: `DATABASE_URL`, `BASE_PATH` (default `/e2e-lane-fastapi-react`), `ADMIN_USERNAME`, `ADMIN_PASSWORD`, `JWT_SECRET`. - `app/database.py` — SQLAlchemy engine (pool_pre_ping), `SessionLocal`, `get_db` dependency. - `app/models.py` — `Task` (id, title:str, status:str default "To do", created_at) and `AdminUser` (id, username, password_hash). - `app/schemas.py` — `TaskCreate` (title: constrained non-empty), `TaskOut`. - `app/seed.py` — create tables; seed 3 tasks if empty; seed admin if none. - `app/security.py` — bcrypt hash/verify, JWT issue/verify. - `app/routers/tasks.py` — `GET /api/tasks`, `POST /api/tasks`. - `app/routers/health.py` — `GET /api/health`, `GET /api/health/deep`. - `app/routers/auth.py` — `POST /api/admin/login`. **Frontend (`frontend/`)** - `package.json`, `vite.config.ts`, `tsconfig.json`, `index.html`. - `src/main.tsx` — bootstrap, `BrowserRouter basename={BASE_PATH}`. - `src/App.tsx` — routes (flow nodes below). - `src/api.ts` — fetch helpers prefixing `BASE_PATH` for `/api/*`. - `src/pages/TasksPage.tsx` — "My Tasks" header, list rows (title + status badge), "Add Task" button → `/tasks/new`; 503/error state. - `src/pages/NewTaskPage.tsx` — "Title" field, "Create" button, client validation, redirect to `/tasks`. - `src/pages/AboutPage.tsx` — "About Task List" heading. - `src/pages/AdminLoginPage.tsx` — admin login form (`/admin/login`). - `src/components/TaskRow.tsx`, `src/components/StatusBadge.tsx`. ### Dependencies - Backend: FastAPI, Uvicorn, SQLAlchemy, psycopg, Pydantic/pydantic-settings, passlib[bcrypt], pyjwt. - Frontend: React 18, react-router-dom v6, Vite, TypeScript. - Runtime: PostgreSQL (provisioned by pipeline; `DATABASE_URL` via `app-secrets`). ### Assumptions - Stack is FastAPI + React + PostgreSQL (per repo name/placeholder). No prior source exists — greenfield. - App is reached via ingress prefix `/e2e-lane-fastapi-react` (rewrite strips it); Vite `base` and router `basename` set to that prefix, and a middleware strips the prefix if still present so the app works via ingress or direct. - Single container: FastAPI serves API + built SPA; uvicorn binds `0.0.0.0:80`. - `admin_only` auth: task/about routes fully public (no guards); one seeded admin + `/admin/login` only; no public signup. Admin creds from env (`ADMIN_USERNAME`/`ADMIN_PASSWORD`) with dev defaults. - Seeding runs once on startup if the tasks table is empty (3 tasks: mix of "To do"/"Done"); startup does not crash if DB is down. - Task status is a free string constrained to `"To do"`/`"Done"`; new tasks default to `"To do"`. ## Implementation Plan ### Step 1: Backend scaffold + config + DB **Files:** `backend/app/config.py`, `database.py`, `models.py`, `schemas.py` **Change:** Load env via pydantic-settings. Engine with `pool_pre_ping=True`. Define `Task`/`AdminUser` models and `TaskCreate` (Pydantic `constr(strip_whitespace=True, min_length=1)`) / `TaskOut`. This gives validation (empty title → 422) and typed responses. ### Step 2: Seed logic **File:** `backend/app/seed.py` **Change:** `init_db()` creates tables and, if `Task` count is 0, inserts 3 tasks (e.g. two "To do", one "Done"); if `AdminUser` count is 0, inserts admin with hashed password. Wrapped so failures log but don't raise. ### Step 3: Task API **File:** `backend/app/routers/tasks.py` **Change:** `GET /api/tasks` returns all tasks (newest ordering stable); `POST /api/tasks` validates title, persists with status "To do", returns created task. Wrap DB access; on `OperationalError`/connection failure return `503` with a generic message (no internals). Titles stored raw (React escapes on render → XSS-safe). ### Step 4: Health + Auth routers **Files:** `backend/app/routers/health.py`, `auth.py` **Change:** `/api/health` → 200 static; `/api/health/deep` → runs `SELECT 1`, 200 if DB ok else 503. `/api/admin/login` verifies credentials, returns JWT (baseline; guards nothing public). ### Step 5: FastAPI app assembly + static serving + prefix middleware **File:** `backend/app/main.py` **Change:** Create app; add middleware that strips leading `BASE_PATH` from request path if present (ingress compatibility). Include routers. Mount `StaticFiles` for built assets; add catch-all GET returning `index.html` for non-API routes (SPA deep links `/tasks`, `/tasks/new`, `/about`, `/admin/login` → 200). Call `init_db()` on startup (non-fatal). ### Step 6: Frontend scaffold + routing (flow nodes) **Files:** `frontend/vite.config.ts`, `src/main.tsx`, `src/App.tsx`, `src/api.ts` **Change:** Vite `base = "/e2e-lane-fastapi-react/"`. `BrowserRouter basename="/e2e-lane-fastapi-react"`. Routes, each a `data.flow` navigable node: - `/` → redirect to `/tasks` - `/tasks` (list) - `/tasks/new` (create form) - `/about` - `/admin/login` `api.ts` prefixes API calls so requests survive ingress routing. No modals/tabs/wizards in this app. ### Step 7: Pages & components **Files:** `src/pages/*`, `src/components/*` **Change:** TasksPage fetches `/api/tasks`, renders "My Tasks" + rows (title + StatusBadge), "Add Task" links to `/tasks/new`, shows friendly error on 503. NewTaskPage: controlled "Title" input; on submit, block empty (show validation error, no request), else POST then navigate to `/tasks`. AboutPage renders `

About Task List

`. AdminLoginPage posts to `/api/admin/login`. ### Step 8: Dockerfile (multi-stage) + k8s probes **Files:** `Dockerfile`, `k8s/deployment.yaml`, delete `index.html`/`nginx.conf` **Change:** Stage 1 (node:20-alpine) `npm ci && npm run build` → `frontend/dist`. Stage 2 (python:3.12-slim) install requirements, copy `backend/` + built `dist/`, `CMD uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 80`. Add readiness probe `/api/health`, liveness `/api/health`; optional startup probe `/api/health/deep`. ## Testing Strategy - `/tasks` first load shows "My Tasks" + exactly 3 seeded rows with status badges. - "Add Task" navigates to `/tasks/new`; creating with a title redirects to `/tasks` and shows the task with "To do". - Empty title → validation error, no row added, no POST persisted (verify DB unchanged). - `/about` shows "About Task List". - Reload `/tasks` after adding → task persists (DB-backed). - `GET /tasks`, `/tasks/new`, `/about` return 200 unauthenticated (no 401/403). - Submit `` title → stored, rendered as literal text, no execution. - Stop DB → `/tasks` returns 503 / friendly error; `/api/health/deep` returns 503; `/api/health` still 200. - Load `/tasks` with ~100 tasks; confirm p95 < 500ms (single indexed query, small payload). - Verify assets and API load correctly through the ingress prefix URL. ## Risks - **Base-path/asset resolution** under the ingress prefix is the main risk; mitigated by Vite `base` + router `basename` + prefix-strip middleware. Verify via the ingress URL, not a raw container IP. - **Port 80 bind** in container — uvicorn runs as root in the image; acceptable for this staging lane. - **DB availability at startup** — seeding is deferred/non-fatal so the app boots and returns 503 (not crash) when Postgres is down; first successful request path must (re)ensure seed if tables were created late. - **Admin auth is scaffolding only** — present for baseline compliance; not exercised by scenarios, so keep it minimal and out of the public route guards.
